= Two Mains Kinds of Events = 

Mutually Exclusive::
:: Both cannot happen. Either one can happen or the other can happen.
:: Ex.: _You can have your cake or eat it._

Conditionally Independent::
:: The outcome of one of the events depends on the other.
:: Ex.: _You can only go to the movies if you do your homework._

= Some math to go along with it = 

Both of the kinds of events have a law that goes along with them.  

=== Mutually Exclusive ===


=== Conditionally Independent ===
